description: A farmer wants to analyze a high-resolution elevation map of a field to identify areas where water ponds and plan for drainage tile installation.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the LiDAR-based digital elevation model (DEM) for the field.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the high-resolution elevation data.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the DEM to identify all depressions and low-lying areas where water is likely to accumulate.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a map highlighting all potential ponding areas.

nodes.task_description: Generate a preliminary layout plan for drainage tile lines to effectively drain the identified problem areas.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a map showing a proposed drainage tile layout.
